name: From Mind to Machine: The Rise of Manus AI as a Fully Autonomous Digital Agent
snippet:
May 4, 2025 — Manus AI is a general-purpose AI agent introduced in early 2025 as a breakthrough in autonomous artificial intelligence.
This paper provides a comprehensive overview of Manus AI, examining its underlying technical architecture, its wide-ranging applications across industries (including healthcare, finance, manufacturing, robotics, gaming, and more), as well as its advantages, limitations, and future prospects.

name: AI Agent - Manus
snippet: Manus AI is an advanced autonomous AI agent that performs complex tasks with minimal human input. From data analysis and stock insights to content creation and web development, Manus operates asynchronously in the cloud, ensuring seamless automation and efficiency.

name: Manus Agent - World's First Fully Autonomous AI Agent
snippet: Manus AI is a revolutionary AI product launched in March 2025 by the Chinese startup Monica. Unlike traditional AI systems, Manus AI has unparalleled autonomy, capable of planning and executing complex tasks, turning human intent into actual results, rather than just providing suggestions.
